privileged_info_summary: The task uses real data from Natural Earth's official 110m countries dataset (177 features). The input file is sourced from GitHub at https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nvkelso/natural-earth-vector/master/geojson/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.geojson. The split field 'CONTINENT' is verified. The actual data contains 8 unique continent values: Africa, Antarctica, Asia, Europe, North America, Oceania, Seven seas (open ocean), and South America. The metadata omits 'Seven seas (open ocean)' from the expected_continents list. The expected output file count should be 8 (one per unique continent), though the task allows min_files=6 and max_files=9. All 177 features are real geographic country data.
